text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Today, I've come to the track to<n>watch a race. It
looks like Kitasan<n>Black is going to be competing...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me! I don't suppose you've<n>seen Kita by
any chance?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
She still hasn't arrived at the<n>racetrack. The staff
members are<n>looking for her too.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I should never have arranged to meet<n>her at the
racecourse... What if<n>something happened to her
on her<n>way here?!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I'll come too!
choice_data_list: Don't you need to prepare for the race?
Don't you need to prepare for the race?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Ah, yes... You're right...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond stays behind as I<n>head off to
search for Kitasan Black.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
We're almost there! Don't give up<n>now! One more
time! Heave-hooo!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I find Kitasan Black on the riverbank.<n>She's
holding a rope, and at the end<n>of it is a truck that's
submerged in<n>the river.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... We just need to pull alittle more!
choice_data_list: The race is about to start!
The race is about to start!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Already?!

text_block_list.name: Old Man
text_block_list.text:
Wait, you're competing?! You'd<n>better get
yourself over there fast!

text_block_list.name: Truck Driver
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, we can manage this by<n>ourselves. Get
going!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
No way! Didn't you say you have to<n>deliver the
stuff in this truck within the<n>hour?!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Just let me help a little longer! I'll<n>make it to the
race before it starts, I<n>promise!
choice_data_list: All right, but next time I say you need to go, you need to go!
All right, but next time I say you need to go, you need to go!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Got it! Thanks so much! Okay, time to<n>pull!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
But no matter how hard they try, the<n>truck stuck in
the muddy riverbed<n>doesn't budge...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Can't... give up... We're so... close!
choice_data_list: There's no time left to waste!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: No way... Can it really end like this?!
...me help...
Let me help too!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Dia?! What are you doing here?!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
There's no time to explain! I just<n>have to grab
here and pull, right?!

text_block_list.name: Old Man
text_block_list.text:
Another Umamusume? We might just<n>be able to
do this!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
It's bound to budge this time! Here<n>we go,
everyone!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Heave-ho!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Heave-ho!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
With the immense strength of the two
Umamusume, the tires begin to roll,<n>and we finally
pull the truck out!

text_block_list.name: Truck Driver
text_block_list.text:
Whoaaa! Looks like I'll be able to<n>make my
delivery on time after all!<n>Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
No problem at all. We're all here to<n>help each other
out! That's what my<n>dad always says!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: We really did it, Kita!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I'm really sorry, Dia. I didn't mean to<n>make
trouble for you right before our<n>race...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
It's not like you're the only one. I<n>caused you all
kinds of hassle when I<n>was sick.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Besides, I'd miss you if you weren't<n>in the race. I
want to run with you too,<n>you know.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
You're not the only one who was<n>looking forward
to today.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Dia!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Yay! Let's go all out! It's a race for<n>first place
between me and you, Dia!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: That's a promise!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The pair start running beneath the<n>blue sky.
They've overcome disaster,<n>and now—with their
sights set on the<n>track—they vow to race with all
they've got.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: ...Thanks. You really saved the day,<n>Dia!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Well, I figured you must have<n>gotten
yourself mixed up in<n>something!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Hey, that goes for you too! And you<n>still have your
racewear on, even!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Well, I just couldn't sit around<n>knowing you might
be in trouble,<n>could I?!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
...Hehe. I suppose we really are pretty<n>similar,
aren't we?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Yep. If you're ever in a bind, you<n>know I'll come
running!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
After making a vow of firm friendship,<n>the two
sprint off. What kind of race<n>will they put on? My
heart races with<n>anticipation.
